样例 2:

[ torch.LongTensor{} ]
torch_test_case:
{
  "api": "torch.nn.functional.embedding_bag",
  "input": {
    "shape": [
      10
    ],
    "dtype": "int64",
    "sample_values": [
      0,
      -4,
      -3,
      -4,
      -9,
